data.title: 3D-Printed Homes for $99K: ICON’s Jason Ballard on the future of housing | E2277
data.description:
This Week In Startups is made possible by:

IM8 Health - https://IM8health.com/twist 

Grasshopper Bank - https://grasshopper.bank/twist Northwest 

Registered Agent - https://northwestregisteredagent.com/twist 

Plaud - https://Plaud.ai/twist


Today’s show:

Is 3D printing the key to not just solving the housing crisis but bringing us all into a more beautiful and utopian future? ICON founder Jason Ballard thinks so. His company is already building homes for the unhoused and delivering barracks to Fort Bliss at half the cost and a fraction of the time. On TWiST, he tells us space construction is also on the agenda.
Explore the potential for robot-powered concrete construction can help build cheap homes for the unhoused, modernize our military infrastructure, AND colonize the solar system in this exclusive interview.
Then Seby Rubino of Resi Labs demos his real estate “Oracle,” which can guess the price of any home with 98% accuracy… for just fractions of a penny.

PLUS Jason tells a story of the rare founder who got one over on him, and why he’s moving away from vengeance and anger and into love and acceptable.
AND we’ve got more JCal and Lon recommendations in a brand-new Off Duty.


Guests :

Jason Ballard: https://x.com/JasonDBallard
ICON: https://www.iconbuild.com/
ICON on X: https://x.com/ICON3DTech
Seby Rubino: https://x.com/Sebyverse
Resi Labs: https://portal.resilabs.ai/


Timestamps:

0:00 Intro + "balance the ledger" tease
0:40 Jason Ballard (ICON) joins — 3D-printed homes + defense (ICON Prime)
4:48 Housing basics: commutes, quality of life, "food/water/shelter"
6:45 ICON Prime: military construction, survivability, speed, supply chain
9:24 IM8 Health: Start feeling like your best self every day. Go to https://IM8health.com/twist and use the code TWiST to get a free welcome kit, five free travel sachets, and 10% off your order.

12:13 Fort Bliss barracks: 10 in 6 months, half the cost; blast/ballistics
19:53 Beautiful + dignified housing: Community First Village; "where's the floor?"
19:45 Grasshopper Bank: Time is money. Don't waste either. Go to https://grasshopper.bank/twist and get an exclusive $500 cash bonus just for opening an account.
28:35 Austin housing + Lennar Wolf Ranch 3D-printed neighborhood
29:26 Northwest Registered Agent - Get more when you start your business with Northwest. In 10 clicks and 10 minutes, you can form your company and walk away with a real business identity — Learn more at https://www.northwestregisteredagent.com/twist
36:57 Audience Q&A: longevity/cracking; plumbing + electrical
41:03 ICON Titan printer + channel partners; hiring pitch
45:17 Sebi Rubino (Rezzy Labs) joins — BitTensor subnet 46 real estate pricing
50:48 Tau/BitTensor explained: subnet competitions, "narrow intelligence"
58:45 Rezzy demo: portal + pricing engine; customers + business model
1:07:19 "Got shivved for 500k" story: acquisition, investors get zero
1:20:06 Bounties: annotated.com + AI sidebar + headless CMS on BitTensor
1:30:40 Off-duty: View Buds (camera earbuds) + use cases
1:37:43 Off-duty: Anker charger/cable/battery "trio"
1:40:42 Off-duty: The Audacity (AMC) quick review
1:46:13 Wrap-up + secret TWiST group chat on X
